identity.name: Phonic
identity.mission: To visualize the invisible art of conversation through precision and clarity.
identity.metaphor: The Digital Sound Studio mixed with Swiss Control Room
identity.emotional_goal: Recruiters feel like powerful directors; Candidates feel heard and comfortable.

body.usage: Body Text, UI Labels, Form Inputs

code.usage: API Keys, Logs, JSON Data, Timestamp

grid_system.bento_rules: Use Mode B for Dashboards: Summary (col-span-1), Primary Data (col-span-2 row-span-2), Feed/List (col-span-1 row-span-2). Every pixel utilized.

buttons.style: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.style: rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.waveform: Animated canvas or CSS bars simulating audio input. Use strictly for 'Live' states.
visual_enhancers.status_pulse: animate-pulse rounded-full bg-red-500 h-2 w-2 inline-block mr-2
visual_enhancers.glass_morphism: Use heavily in 'Live Monitor' overlays to keep context visible.

login_background.description: Abstract blue and purple sound wave pattern on black background
login_background.usage: Login page background, Hero section background

candidate_placeholder.usage: Candidate profile placeholder (crop as needed) or Team section

universal_guidelines: Do not converge toward generic AI slop aesthetic. Be creative.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. No .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays for premium feel.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Focus on building the 'Dashboard' first as it sets the tone. Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard. Ensure the 'Settings' page uses the 'API Key Variant' for inputs. The 'Interview Room' should be distraction-free (Minimalist Mode).
